name: SearXNG Local Search
description: Local web search via SearXNG instance. Provides searxng_search tool for private, structured web search with full metadata, pagination, time filtering, and engine selection. No external API calls — all search data stays local.

baseUrl.description: SearXNG instance URL (defaults to SEARXNG_URL env var or http://localhost:8888)

timeoutSeconds.description: Timeout in seconds for search requests. Default: 30

cacheTtlMinutes.description: Cache TTL in minutes. Default: 15 (0 to disable)

baseUrl.label: SearXNG URL
baseUrl.help: URL of your local SearXNG instance

cacheTtlMinutes.label: Cache TTL (minutes)
cacheTtlMinutes.help: How long to cache results. Set 0 to disable.
